BrightFarms Recipes

LGBTQ+ Pride Salad

Serves 4. Prep 15 min, cook 15 min.

Ingredients
  • 8oz BrightFarms Crunchy Green Leaf
  • 1 can garbanzo beans, drained and rinsed
  • 4 slices bacon, crisp-cooked and crumbled
  • 4oz cherry tomatoes
  • 1 cup cooked quinoa
  • 2 tsp extra virgin olive oil
  • 1 tsp kosher salt
  • 4-6 small blue potatoes, sliced into 1/4 inch rounds
  • 4 mini orange and yellow bell peppers, cored and sliced into rounds
  • 1/2 small red onion, thinly sliced
  • 4oz crumbled feta cheese, optional
Recipe Preparation
  1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F. Toss blue potatoes and garbanzo beans with olive oil and salt in a bowl until evenly coated, then arrange in a thin layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Roast in the oven for 10-15 minutes, until potatoes are tender.
  2. While the potatoes roast, arrange the greens on a large platter. Top with the bacon, cherry tomatoes, quinoa, bell peppers, red onion, and feta.
  3. Remove the roasted potatoes and garbanzo beans from the oven and let cool slightly. Add them to the platter.
  4. Combine all dressing ingredients in a blender and blend until smooth. Drizzle over the salad just before serving.
  5. Serve immediately.
